cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what time the Ecoworld Discovery Centre closes on a Monday in April. Let me check the information provided. Looking at the opening times section: April 1st to September 30th. For Monday-Friday, it's 10 am to 6 pm. Weekends are 10 am to 7 pm. So April is within the first period. Since April is part of the April 1st to September 30th timeframe, the Monday closing time would be 6
